crossRepoProvenance.closesFinding: IMP-001 SCOPE-9 / T9.4 (multi-repo observability propagation — second wired repo after QF spec 085)

executionHistory.expansionReason: Dogfood requires hands-on live-stack telemetry capture (bring up the smackerel core, drive curl load, measure client-side latency) that does not decompose into independent specialist dispatch; the goal controller parent-expanded the delivery + specialist owners inline and executed them genuinely. executionRuntime=direct-implement classifies the non-orchestrated run so G090 convergence-loop telemetry is not falsely required.
executionHistory.summary: Closed the Smackerel observability dogfood gap: added traceContracts.observability.slos.core.health + workflows link to .github/bubbles-project.yaml; built fail-loud scripts/observability/capture-slo.sh (run+compute, shellcheck-clean, offline compute path unit-tested for within-target 8ms + breach); brought up the smackerel core + deps via ./smackerel.sh up; captured REAL telemetry against live /api/health (port 40001, 600 reqs @20, p99 organically 26.480/34.410/26.026ms across runs, plus a 1500@50 stress run at 35.596ms, all 0% error / 100% availability); declared observabilityWorkflow: core.health in the scope Test Plan; verified Bubbles G100 transitions no-op -> ENFORCED and passes green (exit 0). Specialist phases (gaps/simplify/security/validate/harden/stabilize/regression/chaos/audit/docs) executed genuinely with captured evidence. shellcheck clean; changed files PII-clean; config valid YAML; captured evidence is gitignored runtime output. The /api/health degraded-body readiness nuance is recorded in report.md Discovered Issues with disposition.

notes: Downstream dogfood for bubbles IMP-001 SCOPE-9 / T9.4 (second wired repo after QF spec 085). Brings up the smackerel core (./smackerel.sh up), captures REAL /api/health telemetry, declares observabilityWorkflow: core.health, and proves G100 transitions no-op -> ENFORCED green. executionRuntime=direct-implement classifies the non-orchestrated run so G090 convergence telemetry is not falsely required. Status flips to done once the smackerel state-transition-guard passes truthfully.
